overall.description: First-person perspective of horseback riding through a dark grassy field at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The rider navigates between scattered standing stones and occasional trees in this atmospheric game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered ancient standing stones

events.description: trees become visible on the left horizon as rider approaches treeline

agents.ego_description: riding horse forward through open field while holding a lit torch in left hand

entered.detail: tall menhir-like stone standing upright in the middle distance
standing stone visible on the right side of the field
expansive grassy terrain illuminated by torchlight
dark starry sky visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark open field at night, viewed from horseback. The rider holds a torch that illuminates the immediate grassland and reveals scattered standing stones in the distance. As the horse moves forward, trees begin to appear on the left horizon around the 12-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy trail flanked by trees and bushes

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through area with denser vegetation flanking both sides

entered.detail: cluster of trees on the left side creating a boundary
bushes and low vegetation on the right side

segments.scene_description: The rider moves through a section where trees and bushes line both sides of the path, creating a more enclosed feeling compared to the open field. The standing stone previously on the right passes out of view behind the rider, while the central standing stone grows larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with standing stones and dirt path

events.description: dirt path becomes clearly visible on the right side of the field

agents.ego_description: riding past prominent standing stones while approaching a visible dirt path on the right

entered.detail: large standing stone passing by on the left side
lighter colored dirt trail cutting through the grass on the right

segments.scene_description: The scene opens back up into wide grassland as the trees fall behind. A prominent standing stone passes closely on the left, and a dirt path becomes increasingly visible on the right side of the field. The rider continues toward the horizon where more standing stones are silhouetted against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on horseback through a dark nocturnal landscape that shifts from an open field into a wooded corridor before expanding back into a wide grassland. It begins in a vast, dark field where a handheld torch illuminates the immediate grass and reveals distant standing stones, with trees gradually appearing on the left horizon as the horse advances. As the rider moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed as trees and bushes line both sides of the path, causing the peripheral stones to slip away while a central monolith looms larger ahead. The scene then opens back up into wide grassland as the trees fall behind, passing a prominent standing stone on the left while a dirt path emerges on the right. Finally, the camera continues toward the horizon where further standing stones are silhouetted against the night sky.
